items.title: Worried About AI? Why I'm All-In On These 2 Covered Call ETFs

items.title: BDJ: A Value-Oriented Fund With 8.4% Yield And Nearly 7% Discount
items.description: BDJ is a CEF that invests in the equity of large-cap, dividend-paying, and value-oriented stocks, mostly from the Russell-1000 Value index. Read more on BDJ here.
